arts.ttl: Julian Alvarez tells Atletico Madrid to sign unsettled Chelsea star
arts.sum: Atletico Madrid striker Julian Alvarez has reportedly asked his club to sign want-away Chelsea midfielder Enzo Fernandez. The pair are Argentina international teammates, and it seems Alvarez is really keen to play alongside his fellow countryman at club level. arts.ttl: Exclusive: Manchester United & Chelsea on alert as €40m star’s contract talks stall
arts.sum: Manchester United and Chelsea are understood to be on alert as an opportunity seems to have opened up to sign AC Milan goalkeeper Mike Maignan this summer. arts.sum: The boss surely wants him to stay...

arts.ttl: €80m bid prepared: Chelsea put plan in place for ambitious summer signing
arts.sum: Chelsea are reportedly preparing a transfer bid of around €80million for Barcelona defender Jules Kounde this summer. The Blues are willing to spend big on the France international, and supposedly have a plan in place to convince his club to sell, and to persuade the player to join. arts.ttl: Ryan Reynolds has Chelsea legend to thank with ex-Premier League star dazzling for Wrexham
arts.sum: Wrexham goalkeeper Arthur Okonkwo has played a key part in their push for promotion to the Championship after being mentored by a Chelsea legend during his time at Arsenal

Chelsea are considering sacking Enzo Maresca at the end of the season. Julien Laurens claims that, while Chelsea should keep the Italian in order to retain some kind of stability at a club that has gone through countless managers in recent years, there is very much a risk Maresca could get the chop.

arts.ttl: Chelsea want €50m to let player leave – Enzo Maresca ‘crazy’ about him
arts.sum: Chelsea loanee Renato Veiga has started the past four Serie A games for Juventus. After a brief period out due to an injury, the versatile defender is starting to make an impact. He’s impressed under new manager Igor Tudor, playing a role in the Bianconeri being unbeaten in their last three league games.
